TÜBİTAK 3501 Project Grant Awarded to Dr. Doğukan Bingöl

It is our distinct pleasure to announce that the project coordinated by Asst. Prof. Doğukan Bingöl from the Faculty of Law and entitled “Strengthening the Judicial Control Mechanisms in the Regulation of Power to Use Force within the Context of Criminal Law” has been funded by TUBİTAK 3501 – National Young Researchers Career Development Program.

Remzi Orkun Güner, Reyda Ergün, Aysun Altunkaş takes part as a Researcher, and Mehmet Ozan Erözden takes part as an Advisor in the project.

We congratulate our faculty member for his achievement and wish him continued success.
